parityReductionStatus.label: unitary parity reduction
parityReductionStatus.reason: Reflection symmetry decomposes the coordinate Weyl form into even and odd half-line sectors.

primitiveMixedDerivativeStatus.label: mixed-derivative primitive transport
primitiveMixedDerivativeStatus.reason: The mixed-derivative primitive identity transports coordinate tests to primitive mixed-kernel tests.

volterraNormalizationStatus.label: Volterra/log normalization
volterraNormalizationStatus.reason: The log coordinate and positive Psi weights identify the transported mixed form with the normalized Volterra quotient form.

formCoreClosureStatus.label: closed form-core transport
formCoreClosureStatus.reason: The identity extends from the smooth core to the completed form domain by density and closed-form continuity.

proof: Extend the identity by closed-form continuity.
